headline: Jim Cramer Says Nvidia Is 'Tough To Beat' On Corning Deal, Points Out Google, Amazon Still Have An 'Opponent With Multiple Legs Up'
summary: Nvidia Corp. has deepened its grip on the AI infrastructure race with a $500 million investment in Corning Inc., a move that addresses critical networking bottlenecks even as Amazon.com, Inc. and Alphabet Inc.'s Google intensify efforts to challenge its dominance....

headline: Markets 'love chasing bottlenecks': Wall Street weighs epic run in AI stocks
summary: Wall Street weighs the bottlenecks within the AI trade.
